# Welcome to NorthRelay Documentation



# Welcome to NorthRelay

NorthRelay is a **sovereign SMTP infrastructure** designed for developers who need reliable email delivery without the risks of shared IP reputation.

## Quick Links

<Cards>
  <Card title="Getting Started" href="/docs/getting-started/introduction">
    Learn what NorthRelay is and how it works
  </Card>

  <Card title="Send Your First Email" href="/docs/getting-started/first-email">
    Set up NorthRelay and send an email in 5 minutes
  </Card>

  <Card title="API Reference" href="/docs/api-reference/introduction">
    REST API endpoints, authentication, and error handling
  </Card>

  <Card title="SDKs" href="/docs/sdks/typescript">
    Official TypeScript, Python, and MCP Server libraries
  </Card>
</Cards>

## Why NorthRelay?

### The "Noisy Neighbor" Problem

When you use traditional email services, you share IP addresses with thousands of other senders. If one of them sends spam, **your emails suffer too**.

### The NorthRelay Solution

Our **Two-Pool System** gives you control:

* **Shared Pool** — For development and low-volume senders (Free & $5/mo)
* **Isolated Pool** — Dedicated reputation for production apps ($29+/mo)

No code changes needed to upgrade. Your routing switches automatically when you change tiers.

## Integration Options

| Method             | Best For                                   | Docs                                                  |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| **REST API**       | Full-featured integration                  | [API Reference](/docs/api-reference/introduction)     |
| **SMTP**           | Drop-in replacement for existing providers | [SMTP Configuration](/docs/guides/smtp-configuration) |
| **TypeScript SDK** | Node.js / TypeScript apps                  | [TypeScript SDK](/docs/sdks/typescript)               |
| **Python SDK**     | Python / FastAPI / Django apps             | [Python SDK](/docs/sdks/python)                       |
| **MCP Server**     | AI agents (Claude, Cursor, etc.)           | [MCP Server](/docs/sdks/mcp-server)                   |

[Get Started →](/docs/getting-started/introduction)


# Analytics API



# Analytics API

The Analytics API provides access to delivery metrics, engagement data, geographic breakdowns, and provider-level statistics. Use these endpoints to monitor your sending performance and optimize your email strategy.

## Heatmap

Retrieve hourly engagement data across days of the week. Use this to identify the best times to send emails.

```
GET /analytics/heatmap
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter  | Type   | Default     | Description                                           |
| ---------- | ------ | ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `metric`   | string | `opens`     | Metric to plot: `opens`, `clicks`, `deliveries`       |
| `from`     | string | 30 days ago | Start date (ISO 8601, e.g., `2026-03-01`)             |
| `to`       | string | today       | End date (ISO 8601)                                   |
| `timezone` | string | `UTC`       | Timezone for hour bucketing (e.g., `America/Toronto`) |

### Example Request

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/heatmap?metric=opens&from=2026-03-01&to=2026-03-19&timezone=America/Toronto" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "metric": "opens",
  "from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "to": "2026-03-19T23:59:59.999Z",
  "timezone": "America/Toronto",
  "data": [
    { "day": 0, "hour": 9, "value": 142 },
    { "day": 0, "hour": 10, "value": 187 },
    { "day": 1, "hour": 9, "value": 156 },
    { "day": 1, "hour": 14, "value": 203 }
  ]
}
```

The `day` field is 0-indexed (0 = Sunday, 6 = Saturday). The `hour` field is 0--23 in the requested timezone.

***

## Geographic

Retrieve engagement data broken down by country and optionally by region.

```
GET /analytics/geographic
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type   | Default     | Description                                                  |
| --------- | ------ | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `metric`  | string | `opens`     | Metric: `opens`, `clicks`, `deliveries`                      |
| `from`    | string | 30 days ago | Start date (ISO 8601)                                        |
| `to`      | string | today       | End date (ISO 8601)                                          |
| `country` | string | --          | Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., `CA`, `US`) |

### Example Request

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/geographic?metric=opens&from=2026-03-01" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "metric": "opens",
  "from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "to": "2026-03-19T23:59:59.999Z",
  "data": [
    { "country": "CA", "countryName": "Canada", "value": 4521, "percentage": 42.3 },
    { "country": "US", "countryName": "United States", "value": 3890, "percentage": 36.4 },
    { "country": "GB", "countryName": "United Kingdom", "value": 891, "percentage": 8.3 },
    { "country": "DE", "countryName": "Germany", "value": 456, "percentage": 4.3 }
  ],
  "total": 10692
}
```

***

## Providers

Retrieve delivery and engagement metrics broken down by email provider (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, etc.). Use this to identify deliverability issues with specific providers.

```
GET /analytics/providers
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type    | Default     | Description                                |
| --------- | ------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `from`    | string  | 30 days ago | Start date (ISO 8601)                      |
| `to`      | string  | today       | End date (ISO 8601)                        |
| `limit`   | integer | `10`        | Number of top providers to return (max 50) |

### Example Request

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/providers?from=2026-03-01&limit=5" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "to": "2026-03-19T23:59:59.999Z",
  "data": [
    {
      "provider": "Gmail",
      "domain": "gmail.com",
      "sent": 5200,
      "delivered": 5180,
      "bounced": 12,
      "opened": 2340,
      "clicked": 890,
      "complained": 2,
      "deliveryRate": 99.6,
      "openRate": 45.2,
      "clickRate": 17.2
    },
    {
      "provider": "Outlook",
      "domain": "outlook.com",
      "sent": 3100,
      "delivered": 3050,
      "bounced": 35,
      "opened": 1220,
      "clicked": 410,
      "complained": 5,
      "deliveryRate": 98.4,
      "openRate": 40.0,
      "clickRate": 13.4
    }
  ],
  "total": {
    "sent": 10692,
    "delivered": 10590,
    "bounced": 72,
    "opened": 4580,
    "clicked": 1620,
    "complained": 8
  }
}
```

***

## Export

Export raw analytics data as CSV or JSON for external analysis.

```
GET /analytics/export
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter    | Type   | Default     | Description                                                                       |
| ------------ | ------ | ----------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `from`       | string | 30 days ago | Start date (ISO 8601)                                                             |
| `to`         | string | today       | End date (ISO 8601)                                                               |
| `format`     | string | `json`      | Export format: `json` or `csv`                                                    |
| `metrics`    | string | all         | Comma-separated metrics: `deliveries`, `bounces`, `opens`, `clicks`, `complaints` |
| `groupBy`    | string | `day`       | Aggregation period: `hour`, `day`, `week`, `month`                                |
| `categories` | string | --          | Comma-separated categories to filter by                                           |

### Example Request (JSON)

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/export?from=2026-03-01&to=2026-03-19&format=json&groupBy=day&metrics=deliveries,opens,clicks" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response (JSON)

```json
{
  "from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "to": "2026-03-19T23:59:59.999Z",
  "groupBy": "day",
  "data": [
    {
      "date": "2026-03-01",
      "deliveries": 520,
      "opens": 234,
      "clicks": 89
    },
    {
      "date": "2026-03-02",
      "deliveries": 480,
      "opens": 201,
      "clicks": 76
    }
  ]
}
```

### Example Request (CSV)

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/export?from=2026-03-01&format=csv&groupBy=day" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -o analytics.csv
```

The CSV response includes a `Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="analytics-export.csv"` header. The first row contains column headers.

***

## Summary

Get a high-level summary of your sending performance for a given period.

```
GET /analytics/summary
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type   | Default     | Description           |
| --------- | ------ | ----------- | --------------------- |
| `from`    | string | 30 days ago | Start date (ISO 8601) |
| `to`      | string | today       | End date (ISO 8601)   |

### Example Request

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/analytics/summary?from=2026-03-01" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "from": "2026-03-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "to": "2026-03-19T23:59:59.999Z",
  "totals": {
    "sent": 10692,
    "delivered": 10590,
    "bounced": 72,
    "deferred": 30,
    "opened": 4580,
    "uniqueOpens": 3210,
    "clicked": 1620,
    "uniqueClicks": 1140,
    "complained": 8,
    "unsubscribed": 15
  },
  "rates": {
    "deliveryRate": 99.0,
    "bounceRate": 0.7,
    "openRate": 42.8,
    "clickRate": 15.2,
    "clickToOpenRate": 35.5,
    "complaintRate": 0.07,
    "unsubscribeRate": 0.14
  },
  "quotaUsed": 10692,
  "quotaLimit": 50000,
  "quotaPercentage": 21.4
}
```

The `rates` object contains percentages. `clickToOpenRate` is clicks divided by opens (not by sends).

***

## Metric Definitions

| Metric            | Definition                                                       |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `sent`            | Total emails submitted to the delivery queue                     |
| `delivered`       | Emails accepted by the recipient mail server (2xx SMTP response) |
| `bounced`         | Emails permanently rejected (5xx SMTP response)                  |
| `deferred`        | Emails temporarily rejected; NorthRelay will retry automatically |
| `opened`          | Total open events (includes repeat opens by the same recipient)  |
| `uniqueOpens`     | Distinct recipients who opened at least once                     |
| `clicked`         | Total click events (includes repeat clicks)                      |
| `uniqueClicks`    | Distinct recipients who clicked at least once                    |
| `complained`      | Recipients who marked the email as spam                          |
| `unsubscribed`    | Recipients who clicked the unsubscribe link                      |
| `deliveryRate`    | `delivered / sent * 100`                                         |
| `bounceRate`      | `bounced / sent * 100`                                           |
| `openRate`        | `uniqueOpens / delivered * 100`                                  |
| `clickRate`       | `uniqueClicks / delivered * 100`                                 |
| `clickToOpenRate` | `uniqueClicks / uniqueOpens * 100`                               |
| `complaintRate`   | `complained / delivered * 100`                                   |
| `unsubscribeRate` | `unsubscribed / delivered * 100`                                 |


# Authentication



# Authentication

All NorthRelay API requests require authentication. The primary method is Bearer token authentication using API keys.

## API Key Formats

NorthRelay issues two types of API keys, distinguished by prefix:

| Prefix     | Environment | Behavior                                                |
| ---------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `nr_live_` | Production  | Sends real emails through your configured delivery pool |
| `nr_test_` | Sandbox     | Simulates sending without delivering; charges no quota  |

Both key types authenticate against the same endpoints. Use `nr_test_` keys during development and integration testing to avoid consuming your monthly quota.

## Creating an API Key

1. Navigate to **Dashboard > Settings > API Keys**
2. Click **Create API Key**
3. Enter a descriptive name (e.g., "Production Backend", "Staging CI")
4. Select the key scope (see [Key Scopes](#key-scopes) below)
5. Click **Generate**
6. Copy the key immediately -- it is shown only once

The key is a long random string prefixed with `nr_live_` or `nr_test_`:

```
nr_live_sk_7f3a9b2c4d5e6f1a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f
```

## Using Your API Key

Include the key in the `Authorization` header as a Bearer token:

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/emails/send \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "from": { "email": "hello@yourdomain.com", "name": "Your App" },
    "to": [{ "email": "user@example.com" }],
    "content": {
      "subject": "Welcome!",
      "text": "Thanks for signing up."
    }
  }'
```

### Node.js (fetch)

```typescript
const response = await fetch("https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/emails/send", {
  method: "POST",
  headers: {
    "Authorization": `Bearer ${process.env.NORTHRELAY_API_KEY}`,
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    from: { email: "hello@yourdomain.com", name: "Your App" },
    to: [{ email: "user@example.com" }],
    content: {
      subject: "Welcome!",
      text: "Thanks for signing up.",
    },
  }),
});

const result = await response.json();
```

### Python (requests)

```python
import os
import requests

response = requests.post(
    "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/emails/send",
    headers={
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['NORTHRELAY_API_KEY']}",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    },
    json={
        "from": {"email": "hello@yourdomain.com", "name": "Your App"},
        "to": [{"email": "user@example.com"}],
        "content": {
            "subject": "Welcome!",
            "text": "Thanks for signing up.",
        },
    },
)

result = response.json()
```

## Key Scopes

API keys can be scoped to limit their permissions:

| Scope         | Permissions                                                                  |
| ------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `full_access` | All API operations (send, domains, templates, contacts, webhooks, analytics) |
| `sending`     | Send emails, use templates, validate addresses                               |
| `read_only`   | List and read resources; no create, update, or delete operations             |

Select the narrowest scope that meets your use case. A key with `sending` scope cannot manage domains or webhooks.

## Session Authentication

Dashboard endpoints also accept NextAuth.js session cookies. This is used automatically when you interact with the API from the NorthRelay dashboard. Session auth is not recommended for server-to-server integrations -- use API keys instead.

## Error Responses

Authentication failures return a `401` status:

```json
{
  "code": "UNAUTHORIZED",
  "message": "Authentication required",
  "action": "Sign in to your account or provide a valid API key.",
  "docs_url": "https://docs.northrelay.ca/api/authentication"
}
```

An invalid or revoked key returns:

```json
{
  "code": "API_KEY_INVALID",
  "message": "The provided API key is invalid or has been revoked",
  "action": "Generate a new API key in Dashboard > Settings > API Keys.",
  "docs_url": "https://docs.northrelay.ca/api-keys/troubleshooting"
}
```

## Security Best Practices

1. **Never commit API keys to version control.** Store them in environment variables or a secrets manager.

2. **Use separate keys per environment.** Create distinct keys for production, staging, and development.

3. **Rotate keys regularly.** Revoke and regenerate keys every 90 days or after any suspected exposure.

4. **Use the narrowest scope.** A backend that only sends emails should use a `sending`-scoped key, not `full_access`.

5. **Use `nr_test_` keys for development.** Avoid consuming production quota or accidentally sending real emails during testing.

6. **Restrict server-side only.** Never expose API keys in client-side JavaScript, mobile apps, or public repositories.

7. **Monitor key usage.** Review API key activity in Dashboard > Settings > API Keys to detect unauthorized use.

8. **Revoke compromised keys immediately.** If a key is leaked, revoke it in the dashboard and generate a replacement.


# Contacts API



# Contacts API

The Contacts API lets you store recipient information, organize contacts into lists, and manage tags for targeted email campaigns.

## List Contacts

Retrieve all contacts for your account.

```
GET /contacts
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type    | Default | Description                            |
| --------- | ------- | ------- | -------------------------------------- |
| `page`    | integer | `1`     | Page number                            |
| `limit`   | integer | `25`    | Items per page (max 100)               |
| `search`  | string  | --      | Search by email or name                |
| `listId`  | string  | --      | Filter by contact list ID              |
| `tag`     | string  | --      | Filter by tag key (e.g., `tag=region`) |

### Example Request

```bash
curl "https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts?limit=10&search=alice" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "ct_a1b2c3d4",
      "email": "alice@example.com",
      "firstName": "Alice",
      "lastName": "Johnson",
      "tags": { "region": "us-east", "source": "signup" },
      "lists": ["lst_x1y2z3"],
      "metadata": { "company": "Acme Inc" },
      "subscribed": true,
      "createdAt": "2026-03-01T10:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-15T08:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 1,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

***

## Get Contact

Retrieve a single contact by ID.

```
GET /contacts/{id}
```

### Example Request

```bash
curl https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts/ct_a1b2c3d4 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

***

## Create Contact

Add a new contact.

```
POST /contacts
```

### Request Body

| Field        | Type                    | Required | Description                                     |
| ------------ | ----------------------- | -------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `email`      | string                  | Yes      | Contact email address                           |
| `firstName`  | string                  | No       | First name                                      |
| `lastName`   | string                  | No       | Last name                                       |
| `tags`       | Record\<string, string> | No       | Key-value tags for segmentation                 |
| `lists`      | string\[]               | No       | Array of contact list IDs to add the contact to |
| `metadata`   | Record\<string, any>    | No       | Arbitrary metadata                              |
| `subscribed` | boolean                 | No       | Subscription status (default: `true`)           |

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "email": "bob@example.com",
    "firstName": "Bob",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "tags": { "region": "eu-west", "source": "import" },
    "lists": ["lst_x1y2z3"],
    "metadata": { "company": "Example Corp" }
  }'
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "id": "ct_e5f6g7h8",
  "email": "bob@example.com",
  "firstName": "Bob",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "tags": { "region": "eu-west", "source": "import" },
  "lists": ["lst_x1y2z3"],
  "metadata": { "company": "Example Corp" },
  "subscribed": true,
  "createdAt": "2026-03-19T14:30:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-03-19T14:30:00.000Z"
}
```

If a contact with the same email already exists, the API returns a `400` error with code `VALIDATION_ERROR`.

***

## Update Contact

Update an existing contact. Only the fields you include are changed.

```
PUT /contacts/{id}
```

### Request Body

| Field        | Type                    | Required | Description                |
| ------------ | ----------------------- | -------- | -------------------------- |
| `email`      | string                  | No       | Updated email address      |
| `firstName`  | string                  | No       | Updated first name         |
| `lastName`   | string                  | No       | Updated last name          |
| `tags`       | Record\<string, string> | No       | Replace all tags           |
| `lists`      | string\[]               | No       | Replace list memberships   |
| `metadata`   | Record\<string, any>    | No       | Replace metadata           |
| `subscribed` | boolean                 | No       | Update subscription status |

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X PUT https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts/ct_e5f6g7h8 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "tags": { "region": "eu-west", "source": "import", "tier": "premium" },
    "subscribed": true
  }'
```

***

## Delete Contact

Permanently remove a contact.

```
DELETE /contacts/{id}
```

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X DELETE https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts/ct_e5f6g7h8 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "id": "ct_e5f6g7h8",
  "deleted": true
}
```

***

## Bulk Import Contacts

Import multiple contacts in a single request. Existing contacts (matched by email) are updated; new contacts are created.

```
POST /contacts/import
```

### Request Body

| Field            | Type      | Required | Description                                               |
| ---------------- | --------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `contacts`       | object\[] | Yes      | Array of contact objects (max 10,000)                     |
| `listId`         | string    | No       | Add all imported contacts to this list                    |
| `updateExisting` | boolean   | No       | Update existing contacts on email match (default: `true`) |

Each object in the `contacts` array uses the same fields as [Create Contact](#create-contact).

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts/import \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "contacts": [
      { "email": "alice@example.com", "firstName": "Alice", "tags": { "source": "csv" } },
      { "email": "bob@example.com", "firstName": "Bob", "tags": { "source": "csv" } },
      { "email": "carol@example.com", "firstName": "Carol", "tags": { "source": "csv" } }
    ],
    "listId": "lst_x1y2z3",
    "updateExisting": true
  }'
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "imported": 3,
  "created": 2,
  "updated": 1,
  "failed": 0,
  "errors": []
}
```

If individual contacts fail validation, they are skipped and listed in the `errors` array with the reason.

***

## Contact Lists

Contact lists are named groups for organizing contacts. Use lists to target specific segments when sending batch emails.

### List All Contact Lists

```
GET /contacts/lists
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "lst_x1y2z3",
      "name": "Newsletter Subscribers",
      "contactCount": 1542,
      "createdAt": "2026-02-15T10:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-03-18T12:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 25,
    "total": 3,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

### Create Contact List

```
POST /contacts/lists
```

| Field  | Type   | Required | Description |
| ------ | ------ | -------- | ----------- |
| `name` | string | Yes      | List name   |

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/contacts/lists \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "name": "Product Launch 2026" }'
```

### Update Contact List

```
PUT /contacts/lists/{id}
```

| Field  | Type   | Required | Description       |
| ------ | ------ | -------- | ----------------- |
| `name` | string | No       | Updated list name |

### Delete Contact List

```
DELETE /contacts/lists/{id}
```

Deleting a list does not delete the contacts in it. Contacts are simply removed from the list membership.

### Add Contacts to List

```
POST /contacts/lists/{id}/contacts
```

| Field        | Type      | Required | Description                 |
| ------------ | --------- | -------- | --------------------------- |
| `contactIds` | string\[] | Yes      | Array of contact IDs to add |

### Remove Contacts from List

```
DELETE /contacts/lists/{id}/contacts
```

| Field        | Type      | Required | Description                    |
| ------------ | --------- | -------- | ------------------------------ |
| `contactIds` | string\[] | Yes      | Array of contact IDs to remove |

***

## Contact Object Reference

| Field        | Type                    | Description                                 |
| ------------ | ----------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `id`         | string                  | Unique contact identifier                   |
| `email`      | string                  | Contact email address                       |
| `firstName`  | string \| null          | First name                                  |
| `lastName`   | string \| null          | Last name                                   |
| `tags`       | Record\<string, string> | Key-value tags for segmentation             |
| `lists`      | string\[]               | IDs of contact lists the contact belongs to |
| `metadata`   | Record\<string, any>    | Arbitrary metadata                          |
| `subscribed` | boolean                 | Whether the contact is subscribed           |
| `createdAt`  | string                  | ISO 8601 creation timestamp                 |
| `updatedAt`  | string                  | ISO 8601 last update timestamp              |


# Domains API



# Domains API

Custom sending domains let you send emails from your own domain (e.g., `hello@yourdomain.com`) instead of a NorthRelay system subdomain. Custom domains require proper DNS configuration for SPF, DKIM, and DMARC.

**Tier requirement:** Custom domains are available on Startup ($29/mo) and above. Sandbox and Micro tiers cannot add custom domains.

| Tier       | Custom Domain Limit |
| ---------- | ------------------- |
| Sandbox    | 0                   |
| Micro      | 0                   |
| Startup    | 1                   |
| Scale      | 5                   |
| Enterprise | Unlimited           |

## List Domains

Retrieve all domains associated with your account.

```
GET /domains
```

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type    | Default | Description                                       |
| --------- | ------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| `page`    | integer | `1`     | Page number                                       |
| `limit`   | integer | `25`    | Items per page (max 100)                          |
| `status`  | string  | --      | Filter by status: `pending`, `verified`, `failed` |

### Example Request

```bash
curl https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/domains \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "dom_a1b2c3d4",
      "hostname": "yourdomain.com",
      "status": "verified",
      "isInboxHosted": false,
      "dnsRecords": {
        "spf": { "status": "verified", "value": "v=spf1 include:_spf.north-pipe.ca -all" },
        "dkim": { "status": "verified", "selector": "default" },
        "dmarc": { "status": "verified", "value": "v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:dmarc@yourdomain.com" },
        "verification": { "status": "verified", "value": "northrelay-verify=dom_a1b2c3d4" }
      },
      "createdAt": "2026-03-01T10:00:00.000Z",
      "verifiedAt": "2026-03-01T10:15:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 25,
    "total": 1,
    "totalPages": 1
  }
}
```

***

## Get Domain

Retrieve details for a single domain.

```
GET /domains/{id}
```

### Example Request

```bash
curl https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/domains/dom_a1b2c3d4 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

Returns the same domain object structure as the list endpoint.

***

## Add Domain

Register a new custom sending domain. After adding, you must configure DNS records and call the [Verify Domain](#verify-domain) endpoint.

```
POST /domains
```

### Request Body

| Field      | Type   | Required | Description                          |
| ---------- | ------ | -------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `hostname` | string | Yes      | Domain name (e.g., `yourdomain.com`) |

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/domains \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "hostname": "yourdomain.com" }'
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "id": "dom_a1b2c3d4",
  "hostname": "yourdomain.com",
  "status": "pending",
  "dnsRecords": {
    "verification": {
      "type": "TXT",
      "host": "yourdomain.com",
      "value": "northrelay-verify=dom_a1b2c3d4",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    "spf": {
      "type": "TXT",
      "host": "yourdomain.com",
      "value": "v=spf1 include:_spf.north-pipe.ca -all",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    "dkim": {
      "type": "TXT",
      "host": "default._domainkey.yourdomain.com",
      "value": "v=DKIM1; k=rsa; p=MIIBIjANBgkq...",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    "dmarc": {
      "type": "TXT",
      "host": "_dmarc.yourdomain.com",
      "value": "v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:dmarc@yourdomain.com",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  },
  "createdAt": "2026-03-19T14:30:00.000Z"
}
```

### Error: Domain Limit Reached

```json
{
  "code": "API_KEY_LIMIT_REACHED",
  "message": "You have reached the maximum number of custom domains for your plan",
  "action": "Upgrade to a higher tier to add more domains.",
  "docs_url": "https://docs.northrelay.ca/api-keys/limits"
}
```

***

## DNS Record Requirements

After adding a domain, configure these four DNS records at your DNS provider:

### 1. Verification TXT Record

Proves domain ownership. Required before any other records are checked.

| Field | Value                            |
| ----- | -------------------------------- |
| Type  | `TXT`                            |
| Host  | `yourdomain.com`                 |
| Value | `northrelay-verify=dom_a1b2c3d4` |
| TTL   | 300 (or lowest available)        |

### 2. SPF Record

Authorizes NorthRelay relay IPs to send on your behalf.

| Field | Value                                    |
| ----- | ---------------------------------------- |
| Type  | `TXT`                                    |
| Host  | `yourdomain.com`                         |
| Value | `v=spf1 include:_spf.north-pipe.ca -all` |

If you have an existing SPF record, add `include:_spf.north-pipe.ca` before the `all` mechanism. Only one SPF record per domain is allowed.

### 3. DKIM Record

Enables cryptographic signing of outbound emails. The public key is provided when you add the domain.

| Field | Value                               |
| ----- | ----------------------------------- |
| Type  | `TXT`                               |
| Host  | `default._domainkey.yourdomain.com` |
| Value | Provided in the Add Domain response |

### 4. DMARC Record

Tells receiving servers how to handle authentication failures.

| Field | Value                                                     |
| ----- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| Type  | `TXT`                                                     |
| Host  | `_dmarc.yourdomain.com`                                   |
| Value | `v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:dmarc@yourdomain.com` |

Replace `dmarc@yourdomain.com` with the address where you want to receive DMARC aggregate reports.

***

## Verify Domain

Trigger DNS verification for a domain. NorthRelay checks all four DNS records and updates their status.

```
POST /domains/{id}/verify
```

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X POST https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/domains/dom_a1b2c3d4/verify \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response (Success)

```json
{
  "id": "dom_a1b2c3d4",
  "hostname": "yourdomain.com",
  "status": "verified",
  "dnsRecords": {
    "verification": { "status": "verified" },
    "spf": { "status": "verified" },
    "dkim": { "status": "verified" },
    "dmarc": { "status": "verified" }
  },
  "verifiedAt": "2026-03-19T14:35:00.000Z"
}
```

### Example Response (Partial Failure)

```json
{
  "id": "dom_a1b2c3d4",
  "hostname": "yourdomain.com",
  "status": "pending",
  "dnsRecords": {
    "verification": { "status": "verified" },
    "spf": { "status": "verified" },
    "dkim": { "status": "pending" },
    "dmarc": { "status": "pending" }
  },
  "verifiedAt": null
}
```

The domain status remains `pending` until all four records pass verification. You can call this endpoint repeatedly as you configure records.

### Common Verification Errors

| Error Code                | Cause                              | Fix                                                               |
| ------------------------- | ---------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `DNS_VERIFICATION_FAILED` | Verification TXT record not found  | Add the TXT record and wait for DNS propagation (up to 48 hours)  |
| `DNS_RECORD_MISSING`      | SPF, DKIM, or DMARC record missing | Add the missing record per the instructions above                 |
| `DNS_LOOKUP_ERROR`        | DNS query failed                   | Check that the domain resolves and your DNS provider is reachable |

***

## Delete Domain

Remove a custom domain. This immediately stops sending from that domain. Emails already queued may still be delivered.

```
DELETE /domains/{id}
```

### Example Request

```bash
curl -X DELETE https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/domains/dom_a1b2c3d4 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx"
```

### Example Response

```json
{
  "id": "dom_a1b2c3d4",
  "deleted": true
}
```

***

## Domain Object Reference

| Field           | Type           | Description                                                |
| --------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| `id`            | string         | Unique domain identifier                                   |
| `hostname`      | string         | Domain name                                                |
| `status`        | string         | `pending`, `verified`, or `failed`                         |
| `isInboxHosted` | boolean        | Whether catch-all inbox hosting is enabled                 |
| `dnsRecords`    | object         | Status of each DNS record (verification, SPF, DKIM, DMARC) |
| `createdAt`     | string         | ISO 8601 creation timestamp                                |
| `verifiedAt`    | string \| null | ISO 8601 verification timestamp                            |


# API Reference



# API Reference

The NorthRelay API lets you send transactional and marketing emails, manage domains, templates, contacts, suppressions, and retrieve analytics programmatically.

## Base URL

All API requests use the following base URL:

```
https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/
```

All requests must be made over HTTPS. Plain HTTP requests are rejected.

## Authentication

Authenticate every request with a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header:

```bash
curl https://app.northrelay.ca/api/v1/emails/send \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer nr_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ ... }'
```

API keys use two prefixes:

| Prefix     | Environment | Purpose                                                            |
| ---------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `nr_live_` | Production  | Sends real emails through your configured pool                     |
| `nr_test_` | Sandbox     | Simulates sends without delivering; useful for integration testing |

Create and manage keys in **Dashboard > Settings > API Keys**. See the [Authentication](/api-reference/authentication) page for full details.

## Rate Limits

Rate limits are enforced per-account based on your plan tier. Limits are expressed as monthly email quotas:

| Tier       | Monthly Quota | Price  | Pool      |
| ---------- | ------------- | ------ | --------- |
| Sandbox    | 3,000         | Free   | Shared    |
| Micro      | 10,000        | $5/mo  | Shared    |
| Startup    | 50,000        | $29/mo | Isolated  |
| Scale      | 150,000       | $65/mo | Isolated  |
| Enterprise | 200,000       | Custom | Dedicated |

When you exceed your quota, the API returns a `429` status with the `RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` error code. The response includes a `Retry-After` header indicating when you can resume sending.

API request rate limits (separate from email quotas):

| Endpoint                | Limit               |
| ----------------------- | ------------------- |
| `POST /emails/send`     | 100 requests/second |
| `POST /emails/batch`    | 10 requests/second  |
| `POST /emails/validate` | 50 requests/second  |
| All other endpoints     | 200 requests/second |

## Error Handling

Every error response follows a consistent JSON structure with four fields:

```json
{
  "code": "DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND",
  "message": "The specified domain was not found",
  "action": "Check the domain ID and try again",
  "docs_url": "https://docs.northrelay.ca/domains/setup"
}
```

| Field      | Type   | Description                                           |
| ---------- | ------ | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `code`     | string | Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling |
| `message`  | string | Human-readable description of the problem             |
| `action`   | string | Actionable instruction to resolve the issue           |
| `docs_url` | string | Link to relevant documentation                        |

### HTTP Status Codes

| Status | Meaning                           |
| ------ | --------------------------------- |
| `200`  | Success                           |
| `201`  | Resource created                  |
| `400`  | Validation error or bad request   |
| `401`  | Missing or invalid authentication |
| `403`  | Insufficient permissions or tier  |
| `404`  | Resource not found                |
| `429`  | Rate limit exceeded               |
| `500`  | Internal server error             |
| `503`  | Service temporarily unavailable   |

### Error Codes Reference

| Code                        | HTTP Status | Description                                |
| --------------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| `UNAUTHORIZED`              | 401         | No valid session or API key provided       |
| `INVALID_CREDENTIALS`       | 401         | API key is malformed or revoked            |
| `SESSION_EXPIRED`           | 401         | Session token has expired                  |
| `VERIFICATION_FAILED`       | 400         | Verification code is invalid               |
| `VERIFICATION_EXPIRED`      | 400         | Verification code has expired              |
| `RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED`       | 429         | Monthly quota or request rate exceeded     |
| `DOMAIN_NOT_FOUND`          | 404         | Domain ID does not exist                   |
| `DOMAIN_ALREADY_EXISTS`     | 400         | Domain is already registered               |
| `DNS_VERIFICATION_FAILED`   | 400         | Required DNS records not found             |
| `DNS_RECORD_MISSING`        | 400         | Specific DNS record is missing             |
| `DNS_LOOKUP_ERROR`          | 400         | Unable to query DNS for the domain         |
| `API_KEY_NOT_FOUND`         | 404         | API key ID does not exist                  |
| `API_KEY_INVALID`           | 401         | API key is invalid or expired              |
| `API_KEY_LIMIT_REACHED`     | 400         | Maximum number of API keys reached         |
| `WEBHOOK_SIGNATURE_INVALID` | 401         | Webhook signature verification failed      |
| `WEBHOOK_PAYLOAD_INVALID`   | 400         | Webhook payload does not match schema      |
| `WEBHOOK_EVENT_UNKNOWN`     | 400         | Unrecognized webhook event type            |
| `VALIDATION_ERROR`          | 400         | Request body failed validation             |
| `NOT_FOUND`                 | 404         | Requested resource not found               |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR`            | 500         | Unexpected server error                    |
| `SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE`       | 503         | Downstream service temporarily unavailable |

## Pagination

List endpoints return paginated results. Control pagination with query parameters:

| Parameter | Type    | Default | Description              |
| --------- | ------- | ------- | ------------------------ |
| `page`    | integer | `1`     | Page number (1-indexed)  |
| `limit`   | integer | `25`    | Items per page (max 100) |

Every paginated response includes a `pagination` object:

```json
{
  "data": [ ... ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 25,
    "total": 142,
    "totalPages": 6
  }
}
```

## Versioning

The API is versioned via the URL path (`/api/v1/`). Breaking changes will be introduced under a new version prefix (e.g., `/api/v2/`). Non-breaking additions (new fields, new endpoints) are added to the current version without a version bump.

## Content Type

All request bodies must be JSON with the `Content-Type: application/json` header. All responses are JSON.

## Next Steps

* [Authentication](/api-reference/authentication) -- create and use API keys
* [Sending](/api-reference/sending) -- send single, batch, and scheduled emails
* [Domains](/api-reference/domains) -- add and verify custom sending domains
* [Templates](/api-reference/templates) -- manage reusable email templates
* [Webhooks](/api-reference/webhooks) -- receive delivery event notifications

### Account

**Table:** `accounts`

| Field               | Type     | Required | Default | Notes                         |
| ------------------- | -------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------- |
| `id`                | `String` | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key                   |
| `type`              | `String` | Yes      | -       |                               |
| `provider`          | `String` | Yes      | -       |                               |
| `refreshToken`      | `String` | No       | -       | Column: `refresh_token`       |
| `accessToken`       | `String` | No       | -       | Column: `access_token`        |
| `expiresAt`         | `Int`    | No       | -       | Column: `expires_at`          |
| `tokenType`         | `String` | No       | -       | Column: `token_type`          |
| `scope`             | `String` | No       | -       |                               |
| `idToken`           | `String` | No       | -       | Column: `id_token`            |
| `sessionState`      | `String` | No       | -       | Column: `session_state`       |
| `providerAccountId` | `String` | Yes      | -       | Column: `provider_account_id` |
| `userId`            | `String` | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`             |

**Unique constraints:** `(provider, providerAccountId)`

***

### Session

**Table:** `sessions`

| Field          | Type       | Required | Default | Notes                           |
| -------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------- |
| `id`           | `String`   | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key                     |
| `expires`      | `DateTime` | Yes      | -       |                                 |
| `sessionToken` | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Unique, Column: `session_token` |
| `userId`       | `String`   | Yes      | -       |                                 |

***

### VerificationToken

**Table:** `verification_tokens`

| Field        | Type       | Required | Default | Notes  |
| ------------ | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ------ |
| `identifier` | `String`   | Yes      | -       |        |
| `token`      | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Unique |
| `expires`    | `DateTime` | Yes      | -       |        |

**Unique constraints:** `(identifier, token)`

***

### User

**Table:** `users`

| Field                     | Type                      | Required | Default | Notes                               |
| ------------------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `id`                      | `String`                  | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key                         |
| `name`                    | `String`                  | No       | -       |                                     |
| `email`                   | `String`                  | Yes      | -       | Unique                              |
| `emailVerified`           | `DateTime`                | No       | -       |                                     |
| `passwordHash`            | `String`                  | No       | -       |                                     |
| `image`                   | `String`                  | No       | -       |                                     |
| `createdAt`               | `DateTime`                | Yes      | now(    |                                     |
| `updatedAt`               | `DateTime`                | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `quotaLimit`              | `Int`                     | Yes      | 3000    |                                     |
| `quotaUsed`               | `Int`                     | Yes      | 0       |                                     |
| `quotaResetAt`            | `DateTime`                | Yes      | now(    |                                     |
| `poolType`                | `PoolType`                | Yes      | Shared  |                                     |
| `planTier`                | `PlanTier`                | Yes      | Sandbox |                                     |
| `role`                    | `user_role`               | Yes      | USER    |                                     |
| `accountType`             | `account_type`            | Yes      | USER    | Column: `account_type`              |
| `status`                  | `user_status`             | Yes      | ACTIVE  |                                     |
| `suspendReason`           | `String`                  | No       | -       |                                     |
| `suspendedAt`             | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `suspended_at`              |
| `verificationCode`        | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `verification_code`         |
| `verificationCodeExpires` | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `verification_code_expires` |
| `verificationToken`       | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `verification_token`        |
| `company`                 | `String`                  | No       | -       |                                     |
| `stripeCustomerId`        | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `stripe_customer_id`        |
| `stripeSubscriptionId`    | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `stripe_subscription_id`    |
| `stripePaymentMethodId`   | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `stripe_payment_method_id`  |
| `timezone`                | `String`                  | Yes      | "UTC"   |                                     |
| `totpSecret`              | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `totp_secret`               |
| `totpEnabled`             | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | false   | Column: `totp_enabled`              |
| `totpBackupCodes`         | `String[]`                | Yes      | -       | Column: `totp_backup_codes`         |
| `totpVerifiedAt`          | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `totp_verified_at`          |
| `notifyDeliveryReports`   | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | true    | Column: `notify_delivery_reports`   |
| `notifyBounceAlerts`      | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | true    | Column: `notify_bounce_alerts`      |
| `notifyBillingUpdates`    | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | true    | Column: `notify_billing_updates`    |
| `notifyProductUpdates`    | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | false   | Column: `notify_product_updates`    |
| `templateDefaults`        | `Json`                    | No       | -       | Column: `template_defaults`         |
| `deletedAt`               | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `deleted_at`                |
| `abuseReports`            | `AbuseReport[]`           | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `accounts`                | `Account[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `apiKeys`                 | `ApiKey[]`                | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `auditLogs`               | `AuditLog[]`              | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `domains`                 | `Domain[]`                | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `emailEvents`             | `EmailEvent[]`            | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `emails`                  | `Email[]`                 | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `emailBatches`            | `EmailBatch[]`            | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `invoices`                | `Invoice[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `mailboxes`               | `Mailbox[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `mailboxAliases`          | `MailboxAlias[]`          | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `reputationScore`         | `ReputationScore`         | No       | -       |                                     |
| `scheduledEmails`         | `ScheduledEmail[]`        | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `sessions`                | `Session[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `suppressions`            | `Suppression[]`           | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `templates`               | `Template[]`              | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `webhooks`                | `Webhook[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `inboxSettings`           | `InboxSettings`           | No       | -       |                                     |
| `suppressionGroups`       | `SuppressionGroup[]`      | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `dedicatedIps`            | `DedicatedIp[]`           | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `ipPools`                 | `IpPool[]`                | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `subusers`                | `Subuser[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `revokedTokens`           | `RevokedToken[]`          | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `brandThemes`             | `BrandTheme[]`            | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `unsubscribePreferences`  | `UnsubscribePreference[]` | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `contacts`                | `Contact[]`               | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `inboxUsers`              | `InboxUser[]`             | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `campaigns`               | `Campaign[]`              | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `contactLists`            | `ContactList[]`           | Yes      | -       |                                     |
| `domainAddons`            | `DomainAddon[]`           | Yes      | -       |                                     |

| --------------- | ---------- | -------- | -------- | ------------------------- |
| `id`            | `String`   | Yes      | cuid(    | Primary Key               |
| `userId`        | `String`   | Yes      | -        | Unique, Column: `user_id` |
| `signature`     | `String`   | No       | -        |                           |
| `showImages`    | `Boolean`  | Yes      | true     | Column: `show_images`     |
| `autoArchive`   | `Boolean`  | Yes      | false    | Column: `auto_archive`    |
| `replyFormat`   | `String`   | Yes      | "inline" |                           |
| `previewLines`  | `Int`      | Yes      | 2        | Column: `preview_lines`   |
| `notifications` | `Json`     | No       | -        |                           |
| `security`      | `Json`     | No       | -        |                           |
| `appearance`    | `Json`     | No       | -        |                           |
| `filters`       | `Json`     | No       | -        |                           |
| `createdAt`     | `DateTime` | Yes      | now(     | Column: `created_at`      |

| ------------ | ---------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------- |

| `keyPrefix`  | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `key_prefix`       |
| `bcryptHash` | `String`   | No       | -       | Column: `bcrypt_hash`      |
| `lastUsedAt` | `DateTime` | No       | -       | Column: `last_used_at`     |
| `usageCount` | `Int`      | Yes      | 0       | Column: `usage_count`      |
| `scopes`     | `Json`     | No       | -       |                            |
| `userId`     | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`          |

| `isManagedDomain`   | `Boolean`        | Yes      | false    |                             |

| `addons`            | `DomainAddon[]`  | Yes      | -        |                             |
| `inboxUsers`        | `InboxUser[]`    | Yes      | -        |                             |

| `dailySendLimit` | `Int`      | Yes      | 100        | Column: `daily_send_limit` |
| `lastUsedAt`     | `DateTime` | No       | -          | Column: `last_used_at`     |
| `createdAt`      | `DateTime` | Yes      | now(       | Column: `created_at`       |

| `deliveredAt`   | `DateTime`     | No       | -       | Column: `delivered_at`       |

| Field                    | Type                | Required | Default | Notes                              |

| `name`                   | `String`            | Yes      | -       |                                    |
| `subject`                | `String`            | Yes      | -       |                                    |
| `htmlContent`            | `String`            | No       | -       | Column: `html_content`             |
| `textContent`            | `String`            | No       | -       | Column: `text_content`             |

| `variables`              | `Json`              | No       | -       |                                    |
| `extractedVariables`     | `Json`              | No       | -       | Column: `extracted_variables`      |
| `variablesLastExtracted` | `DateTime`          | No       | -       | Column: `variables_last_extracted` |

| `format`                 | `template_format`   | Yes      | BLOCKS  | Column: `format`                   |
| `blockContent`           | `Json`              | No       | -       | Column: `block_content`            |
| `category`               | `TemplateCategory`  | Yes      | OTHER   |                                    |
| `themeId`                | `String`            | No       | -       | Column: `theme_id`                 |
| `createdAt`              | `DateTime`          | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`               |
| `updatedAt`              | `DateTime`          | Yes      | -       | Column: `updated_at`               |
| `versions`               | `TemplateVersion[]` | Yes      | -       |                                    |
| `campaigns`              | `Campaign[]`        | Yes      | -       |                                    |

**Unique constraints:** `(userId, name, version)`

| Field          | Type       | Required | Default | Notes                   |
| -------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------- |
| `id`           | `String`   | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key             |
| `templateId`   | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `template_id`   |
| `version`      | `Int`      | Yes      | -       |                         |
| `userId`       | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`       |
| `name`         | `String`   | Yes      | -       |                         |
| `subject`      | `String`   | Yes      | -       |                         |
| `htmlContent`  | `String`   | No       | -       | Column: `html_content`  |
| `textContent`  | `String`   | No       | -       | Column: `text_content`  |
| `variables`    | `Json`     | No       | -       |                         |
| `blockContent` | `Json`     | No       | -       | Column: `block_content` |
| `createdAt`    | `DateTime` | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`    |

### BrandTheme

**Table:** `brand_themes`

| Field                    | Type         | Required | Default                                                         | Notes                              |
| ------------------------ | ------------ | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `id`                     | `String`     | Yes      | cuid(                                                           | Primary Key                        |
| `userId`                 | `String`     | Yes      | -                                                               | Column: `user_id`                  |
| `name`                   | `String`     | Yes      | "Default"                                                       |                                    |
| `isDefault`              | `Boolean`    | Yes      | false                                                           | Column: `is_default`               |
| `primaryColor`           | `String`     | Yes      | "#0070f3"                                                       | Column: `primary_color`            |
| `secondaryColor`         | `String`     | Yes      | "#1a1a1a"                                                       | Column: `secondary_color`          |
| `accentColor`            | `String`     | Yes      | "#00c2ff"                                                       | Column: `accent_color`             |
| `fontFamily`             | `String`     | Yes      | "-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif" | Column: `font_family`              |
| `fontName`               | `String`     | Yes      | "System"                                                        | Column: `font_name`                |
| `logoUrl`                | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `logo_url`                 |
| `companyName`            | `String`     | Yes      | "My Company"                                                    | Column: `company_name`             |
| `footerHtml`             | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `footer_html`              |
| `socialLinks`            | `Json`       | No       | -                                                               | Column: `social_links`             |
| `bgColor`                | `String`     | Yes      | "#f8fafc"                                                       | Column: `bg_color`                 |
| `cardBgColor`            | `String`     | Yes      | "#ffffff"                                                       | Column: `card_bg_color`            |
| `headingColor`           | `String`     | Yes      | "#0f172a"                                                       | Column: `heading_color`            |
| `textColor`              | `String`     | Yes      | "#475569"                                                       | Column: `text_color`               |
| `mutedColor`             | `String`     | Yes      | "#94a3b8"                                                       | Column: `muted_color`              |
| `borderRadius`           | `String`     | Yes      | "8px"                                                           | Column: `border_radius`            |
| `buttonRadius`           | `String`     | Yes      | "8px"                                                           | Column: `button_radius`            |
| `buttonStyle`            | `String`     | Yes      | "filled"                                                        | Column: `button_style`             |
| `designStyle`            | `String`     | Yes      | "default"                                                       | Column: `design_style`             |
| `defaultFromName`        | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `default_from_name`        |
| `defaultFromEmail`       | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `default_from_email`       |
| `trackingDomain`         | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `tracking_domain`          |
| `trackingDomainVerified` | `Boolean`    | Yes      | false                                                           | Column: `tracking_domain_verified` |
| `unsubscribePageTitle`   | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `unsubscribe_page_title`   |
| `unsubscribePageMessage` | `String`     | No       | -                                                               | Column: `unsubscribe_page_message` |
| `createdAt`              | `DateTime`   | Yes      | now(                                                            | Column: `created_at`               |
| `updatedAt`              | `DateTime`   | Yes      | -                                                               | Column: `updated_at`               |
| `templates`              | `Template[]` | Yes      | -                                                               |                                    |
| `campaigns`              | `Campaign[]` | Yes      | -                                                               |                                    |

**Unique constraints:** `(userId, name)`

***

| -------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------- |

| `contactEmail` | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `contact_email` |

### Webhook

**Table:** `webhooks`

| Field                      | Type                | Required | Default | Notes                                 |
| -------------------------- | ------------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `id`                       | `String`            | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key                           |
| `userId`                   | `String`            | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`                     |
| `url`                      | `String`            | Yes      | -       |                                       |
| `events`                   | `Json`              | Yes      | -       |                                       |
| `description`              | `String`            | No       | -       |                                       |
| `active`                   | `Boolean`           | Yes      | true    |                                       |
| `secretHash`               | `String`            | Yes      | -       | Column: `secret_hash`                 |
| `secretPrefix`             | `String`            | Yes      | -       | Column: `secret_prefix`               |
| `previousSecretHash`       | `String`            | No       | -       | Column: `previous_secret_hash`        |
| `previousSecretValidUntil` | `DateTime`          | No       | -       | Column: `previous_secret_valid_until` |
| `failureNotify`            | `Boolean`           | Yes      | false   | Column: `failure_notify`              |
| `failureEmails`            | `Json`              | No       | -       | Column: `failure_emails`              |
| `failureThreshold`         | `Int`               | Yes      | 5       | Column: `failure_threshold`           |
| `autoDisableAfter`         | `Int`               | Yes      | 0       | Column: `auto_disable_after`          |
| `createdAt`                | `DateTime`          | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`                  |
| `updatedAt`                | `DateTime`          | Yes      | -       | Column: `updated_at`                  |
| `webhookDeliveries`        | `WebhookDelivery[]` | Yes      | -       |                                       |

| `updatedAt`          | `DateTime`             | Yes      | -       | Column: `updated_at`      |
| `tags`               | `ContactTag[]`         | Yes      | -       |                           |

| `listMemberships`    | `ContactListMember[]`  | Yes      | -       |                           |

### Campaign

**Table:** `campaigns`

| Field               | Type                  | Required | Default | Notes                        |
| ------------------- | --------------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------- |
| `id`                | `String`              | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key                  |
| `userId`            | `String`              | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`            |
| `name`              | `String`              | Yes      | -       |                              |
| `subject`           | `String`              | Yes      | -       |                              |
| `preheaderText`     | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `preheader_text`     |
| `fromName`          | `String`              | Yes      | -       | Column: `from_name`          |
| `fromEmail`         | `String`              | Yes      | -       | Column: `from_email`         |
| `replyTo`           | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `reply_to`           |
| `templateId`        | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `template_id`        |
| `htmlContent`       | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `html_content`       |
| `textContent`       | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `text_content`       |
| `themeId`           | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `theme_id`           |
| `templateVariables` | `Json`                | No       | -       | Column: `template_variables` |
| `status`            | `CampaignStatus`      | Yes      | -       |                              |
| `approvalStatus`    | `ApprovalStatus`      | Yes      | DRAFT   | Column: `approval_status`    |
| `approvedBy`        | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `approved_by`        |
| `approvedAt`        | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `approved_at`        |
| `reviewNotes`       | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `review_notes`       |
| `scheduledFor`      | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `scheduled_for`      |
| `sentAt`            | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `sent_at`            |
| `completedAt`       | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `completed_at`       |
| `sendWindow`        | `Json`                | No       | -       | Column: `send_window`        |
| `maxRecipients`     | `Int`                 | No       | -       | Column: `max_recipients`     |
| `estimatedCost`     | `Decimal`             | No       | -       | Column: `estimated_cost`     |
| `abTestEnabled`     | `Boolean`             | Yes      | false   | Column: `ab_test_enabled`    |
| `abTestConfig`      | `Json`                | No       | -       | Column: `ab_test_config`     |
| `trackOpens`        | `Boolean`             | Yes      | true    | Column: `track_opens`        |
| `trackClicks`       | `Boolean`             | Yes      | true    | Column: `track_clicks`       |
| `totalRecipients`   | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `total_recipients`   |
| `sentCount`         | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `sent_count`         |
| `deliveredCount`    | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `delivered_count`    |
| `openedCount`       | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `opened_count`       |
| `clickedCount`      | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `clicked_count`      |
| `bouncedCount`      | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `bounced_count`      |
| `complainedCount`   | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `complained_count`   |
| `unsubscribedCount` | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `unsubscribed_count` |
| `parentId`          | `String`              | No       | -       | Column: `parent_id`          |
| `createdAt`         | `DateTime`            | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`         |
| `updatedAt`         | `DateTime`            | Yes      | -       | Column: `updated_at`         |
| `recipients`        | `CampaignRecipient[]` | Yes      | -       |                              |
| `events`            | `CampaignEvent[]`     | Yes      | -       |                              |

***

### ContactList

**Table:** `contact_lists`

| Field          | Type                  | Required | Default | Notes                    |
| -------------- | --------------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------ |
| `id`           | `String`              | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key              |
| `userId`       | `String`              | Yes      | -       | Column: `user_id`        |
| `ownerId`      | `String`              | Yes      | -       | Column: `owner_id`       |
| `name`         | `String`              | Yes      | -       |                          |
| `description`  | `String`              | No       | -       |                          |
| `type`         | `ListType`            | Yes      | -       |                          |
| `segmentRules` | `Json`                | No       | -       | Column: `segment_rules`  |
| `contactCount` | `Int`                 | Yes      | 0       | Column: `contact_count`  |
| `isArchived`   | `Boolean`             | Yes      | false   | Column: `is_archived`    |
| `archivedAt`   | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `archived_at`    |
| `metadata`     | `Json`                | No       | -       |                          |
| `lastSyncedAt` | `DateTime`            | No       | -       | Column: `last_synced_at` |
| `createdAt`    | `DateTime`            | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`     |
| `updatedAt`    | `DateTime`            | Yes      | -       | Column: `updated_at`     |
| `members`      | `ContactListMember[]` | Yes      | -       |                          |
| `campaigns`    | `CampaignRecipient[]` | Yes      | -       |                          |

**Unique constraints:** `(userId, name)`

***

### ContactListMember

**Table:** `contact_list_members`

| Field       | Type       | Required | Default | Notes                |
| ----------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------- |
| `id`        | `String`   | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key          |
| `contactId` | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `contact_id` |
| `listId`    | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `list_id`    |
| `addedAt`   | `DateTime` | Yes      | now(    | Column: `added_at`   |
| `addedBy`   | `String`   | No       | -       | Column: `added_by`   |
| `removedAt` | `DateTime` | No       | -       | Column: `removed_at` |
| `removedBy` | `String`   | No       | -       | Column: `removed_by` |

**Unique constraints:** `(contactId, listId)`

***

### CampaignRecipient

**Table:** `campaign_recipients`

| Field         | Type                      | Required | Default | Notes                  |
| ------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------- |
| `id`          | `String`                  | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key            |
| `campaignId`  | `String`                  | Yes      | -       | Column: `campaign_id`  |
| `listId`      | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `list_id`      |
| `contactId`   | `String`                  | No       | -       | Column: `contact_id`   |
| `excluded`    | `Boolean`                 | Yes      | false   |                        |
| `status`      | `CampaignRecipientStatus` | Yes      | PENDING |                        |
| `sentAt`      | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `sent_at`      |
| `deliveredAt` | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `delivered_at` |
| `openedAt`    | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `opened_at`    |
| `clickedAt`   | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `clicked_at`   |
| `bouncedAt`   | `DateTime`                | No       | -       | Column: `bounced_at`   |

**Unique constraints:** `(campaignId, listId)`, `(campaignId, contactId)`

***

### CampaignEvent

**Table:** `campaign_events`

| Field        | Type                | Required | Default | Notes                 |
| ------------ | ------------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------- |
| `id`         | `String`            | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key           |

| `metadata`   | `Json`              | No       | -       |                       |

| `userAgent`  | `String`            | No       | -       | Column: `user_agent`  |
| `occurredAt` | `DateTime`          | Yes      | now(    | Column: `occurred_at` |

| `status`               | `AddonStatus` | Yes      | ACTIVE  |                                  |
| `pricePerMonth`        | `Int`         | Yes      | 1000    | Column: `price_per_month`        |
| `stripeSubscriptionId` | `String`      | No       | -       | Column: `stripe_subscription_id` |
| `stripeItemId`         | `String`      | No       | -       | Column: `stripe_item_id`         |
| `enabledAt`            | `DateTime`    | Yes      | now(    | Column: `enabled_at`             |
| `cancelledAt`          | `DateTime`    | No       | -       | Column: `cancelled_at`           |
| `expiresAt`            | `DateTime`    | No       | -       | Column: `expires_at`             |
| `metadata`             | `Json`        | No       | -       |                                  |

**Unique constraints:** `(domainId, addonType)`

***

### PendingSignup

| Field            | Type       | Required | Default | Notes                     |
| ---------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------- |
| `id`             | `String`   | Yes      | cuid(   | Primary Key               |
| `token`          | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Unique                    |
| `email`          | `String`   | Yes      | -       |                           |
| `passwordHash`   | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `password_hash`   |
| `companyName`    | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `company_name`    |
| `subdomain`      | `String`   | Yes      | -       |                           |
| `selectedDomain` | `String`   | Yes      | -       | Column: `selected_domain` |

| `createdAt`      | `DateTime` | Yes      | now(    | Column: `created_at`      |
| `expiresAt`      | `DateTime` | Yes      | -       | Column: `expires_at`      |

***

| `description` | `String`   | No       | -         |                      |
| `category`    | `String`   | Yes      | "general" |                      |
| `isPublic`    | `Boolean`  | Yes      | false     | Column: `is_public`  |
| `updatedAt`   | `DateTime` | Yes      | -         | Column: `updated_at` |
| `updatedBy`   | `String`   | No       | -         | Column: `updated_by` |

| `LEGACY` |
| `BLOCKS` |

| `PENDING_PAYMENT` |


# Sending API



# Sending API

The Sending API provides four endpoints for email delivery and address validation. All sending is API-only -- direct SMTP AUTH access is not available.

## Send Email

Send a single email to one or more recipients.

```
POST /emails/send
```

### Request Body

| Field         | Type                             | Required | Description                                                                 |
| ------------- | -------------------------------- | -------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `from`        | [EmailAddress](#emailaddress)    | Yes      | Sender address                                                              |
| `to`          | [EmailAddress](#emailaddress)\[] | Yes      | Recipients (1--1,000)                                                       |
| `cc`          | [EmailAddress](#emailaddress)\[] | No       | CC recipients                                                               |
| `bcc`         | [EmailAddress](#emailaddress)\[] | No       | BCC recipients                                                              |
| `replyTo`     | [EmailAddress](#emailaddress)    | No       | Reply-to address                                                            |
| `content`     | [Content](#content)              | Yes      | Email content (subject, body, or template)                                  |
| `variables`   | Record\<string, string>          | No       | Template variables for `{{variable}}` substitution                          |
| `themeId`     | string                           | No       | Theme ID for styled rendering                                               |
| `categories`  | string\[]                        | No       | Up to 10 categories (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores; max 64 chars each) |
| `tags`        | Record\<string, string>          | No       | Custom key-value tags for filtering in analytics                            |
| `metadata`    | Record\<string, any>             | No       | Arbitrary metadata returned in webhooks                                     |
